src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the Java EE javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE jakarta.annotation package.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Java 11 and is not available in Java 17; using it causes a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: invalid escape sequence '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.Nonnull import to jakarta.annotation.Nonnull to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings in modern Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.0 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it results in a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent API with .and() to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.0.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The fluent API methods like .csrf().disable() and .authorizeRequests().antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6.0; code must use lambda configurations like .csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable()) to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to comply with Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy in header configuration to align with modern browser standards and Spring Security API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Switch exception handling from custom SecurityProblemSupport to standard OAuth2 BearerToken handlers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The previous implementation relied on a custom adapter that may not be compatible with the new OAuth2 resource server setup; standard handlers are required for proper OAuth2 JWT resource server behavior.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to enable JWT token validation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Without this configuration, the application cannot validate JWT tokens for protected endpoints in the new Spring Security architecture.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Tomcat 10+, causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if javax imports are used.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic, a feature introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Pattern matching for instanceof is not available in Java 11, causing a compile error.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) {
            ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, reflecting changes in Spring Security 6 / Spring Framework 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Security 6 deprecates/removes allowedOrigins in favor of allowedOriginPatterns for wildcard support; failing to check patterns may result in incorrect CORS behavior or runtime warnings/errors.
